case_title: MICHAEL PAGE VS. WENDY FANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF PAGE, MICHAEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $84) SERVED JUN-01-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PHAN, QUAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAGE, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FANG, WENDY PHAN, QUAN PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAGE, MICHAEL
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PAGE, MICHAEL FANG, WENDY PHAN, QUAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,084.00 FILED BY PAGE, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT FANG, WENDY PHAN, QUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL PAGE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WENDY FANG IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER QUAN PHAN, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT QUAN PHAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF PHAN WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT WENDY FENG. SERVICE ON DEFENDANT PHAN IS UNTIMELY: 3 DAYS SHORT. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE AND SERVICE ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
